name: auto-model-switcher
description: Use automatically ranked OpenRouter free models in VS Code Chat and Agent mode.

commands.title: Auto Model Switcher: Show Status Bar Info
Auto Model Switcher: Refresh Free Models
Auto Model Switcher: Open Router Logs
Auto Model Switcher: Manage Favorite Models
Auto Model Switcher: Copy Sanitized Diagnostics

autoModelSwitcher.endpoint.description: Local FreeRouter base URL. Must be http(s) and must not contain credentials.

autoModelSwitcher.connectionTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for connecting to the local router health endpoint.

autoModelSwitcher.requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for a complete chat request, including router fallbacks.

autoModelSwitcher.healthCheckTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for the router health check used by the status bar.

autoModelSwitcher.showTiers.description: Show the Automatic, Fast, Balanced, Complex, and Reasoning routing tiers.

autoModelSwitcher.showDirectModels.description: Show individual eligible free models as direct choices.

autoModelSwitcher.favoriteModels.description: OpenRouter model IDs (e.g. 'tencent/hy3:free') shown first in the model picker.

autoModelSwitcher.includeModels.description: If non-empty, only these model IDs appear as direct choices.

autoModelSwitcher.excludeModels.description: Model IDs to hide from direct choices.

autoModelSwitcher.includeProviders.description: If non-empty, only these providers (e.g. 'google') appear as direct choices.

autoModelSwitcher.excludeProviders.description: Providers to hide from direct choices.

autoModelSwitcher.directSort.description: How direct models are sorted in the picker (favorites always first).

autoModelSwitcher.minimumContextWindow.description: Hide direct models with a context window smaller than this many tokens.

autoModelSwitcher.hideExpiringWithinDays.description: Hide direct models expiring within this many days (0 disables).

autoModelSwitcher.notificationLevel.description: How verbose user-facing notifications should be.

autoModelSwitcher.debugLogging.description: Write detailed diagnostic logs to the Output channel.

autoModelSwitcher.autoRefreshMetadata.description: Watch the generated metadata file and refresh the model list when it changes.
